description_long: This is a striking tomahawk-style axe with a broad, black blade featuring a sharply angled edge and a pronounced curve on one side. The blade is emblazoned with the text 'Tomahawk From HELL' in bold orange letters, adding a dramatic and customized touch. The handle is cylindrical, predominantly black, and decorated with swirling orange patterns that provide both visual interest and a sense of grip texture. The lower portion of the handle is wrapped or molded with a ribbed grip, likely for enhanced handling and control. The axe appears to be constructed primarily from metal for the blade and a durable synthetic or metal core for the handle, with decorative paint or coating. Its overall design is aggressive and modern, suitable for display, collection, or practical use in urban or themed environments.
description: A black tomahawk-style axe with a broad blade, orange decorative patterns, and the text 'Tomahawk From HELL' on the blade. The handle features a ribbed grip and swirling orange designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade profile, orange text, and decorative handle patterns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the blade and handle, with orange patterns visible but no text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and ribbed handle grip.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight handle with ribbed grip, made of synthetic polymer or coated metal, decorated with orange swirling patterns.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, single-edged blade with a sharply angled top, pronounced curve on one side, and a flat poll; features orange text and a matte black finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, likely integrated or molded with the handle, no visible pins or wedges.
